sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43187" key="e(teroplath/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερο-πλᾰτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n43187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with unequal sides</tr_>, of beams, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:161:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">161.12</biblScope> </bibl>:</sense> </entryFree>
